import os, sys, json, torch, numpy as np
from PIL import Image
from transformers import AutoProcessor, Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration

model_path = "/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct"
print("Loading processor...")
processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained(model_path, trust_remote_code=True)
tokenizer = processor.tokenizer

# Inspect added tokens
print("All special tokens:")
for i, tok in enumerate(tokenizer.all_special_tokens):
    tid = tokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids(tok)
    print(f"  {i}: {tok!r} -> id={tid}")
print(f"\nTotal special tokens: {len(tokenizer.all_special_tokens)}")

# Check key tokens for grounding
for tok in ["<|box_start|>", "<|box_end|>", "<|object_ref_start|>", "<|object_ref_end|>",
            "<|quad_start|>", "<|quad_end|>", "<|point_start|>", "<|point_end|>"]:
    tid = tokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids(tok)
    print(f"{tok!r} -> id={tid}")

print("\n--- Testing grounding prompt ---")
model = Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained(
    model_path, torch_dtype=torch.bfloat16, device_map="auto", trust_remote_code=True,
    attn_implementation="sdpa"
)

# Use a real UI image from val split
val_jsonl = "/data/unified_val.jsonl"
with open(val_jsonl, 'r') as f:
    examples = [json.loads(line) for line in f]
ex = examples[0]
img_path = os.path.join("/data", ex["image_path"])
image = Image.open(img_path).convert("RGB")
print(f"Image size: {image.size}, instruction: {ex['instruction']}")

instruction = ex["instruction"]
# Build grounding prompt: user asks to locate, with box tokens as placeholder
messages = [
    {
        "role": "user",
        "content": [
            {"type": "image", "image": image},
            {"type": "text", "text": f"{instruction} <|box_start|><|box_end|>"}
        ]
    }
]

text_prompt = processor.apply_chat_template(messages, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)
print("Prompt (last 200 chars):", text_prompt[-200:])

inputs = processor(text=[text_prompt], images=[image], return_tensors="pt").to(model.device)
print("Inputs keys:", inputs.keys())
print("input_ids shape:", inputs.input_ids.shape)
print("pixel_values shape:", inputs.pixel_values.shape if "pixel_values" in inputs else None)
print("image_grid_thw shape:", inputs.image_grid_thw.shape if "image_grid_thw" in inputs else None)

with torch.no_grad():
    generated_ids = model.generate(**inputs, max_new_tokens=256, do_sample=False, temperature=None)
generated_ids_cut = generated_ids[0][len(inputs.input_ids[0]):]
full_output = processor.decode(generated_ids[0], skip_special_tokens=False)
print("\nFull output with special tokens:")
print(full_output)

# Decode only newly generated tokens
new_tokens = processor.decode(generated_ids_cut, skip_special_tokens=False)
print("\nNewly generated tokens only:")
print(new_tokens)

# Also decode with skip_special_tokens=False to show numeric tokens
# Show token IDs of generated part
print("\nGenerated token IDs:", generated_ids_cut.tolist())

# Check if output contains <|box_start|> ... <|box_end|> with coordinates
if "<|box_start|>" in new_tokens and "<|box_end|>" in new_tokens:
    content = new_tokens.split("<|box_start|>")[1].split("<|box_end|>")[0]
    print("\nExtracted content between box tokens:", content)
else:
    print("\nNo box tokens found in output.")

# Try alternative prompt: system message that instructs grounding
print("\n\n--- Testing with system message ---")
messages2 = [
    {
        "role": "system",
        "content": "You are a UI grounding assistant. When asked to locate an element, output its bounding box using <|box_start|>x1 y1 x2 y2<|box_end|>."
    },
    {
        "role": "user",
        "content": [
            {"type": "image", "image": image},
            {"type": "text", "text": f"Locate: {instruction}"}
        ]
    }
]
text_prompt2 = processor.apply_chat_template(messages2, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)
inputs2 = processor(text=[text_prompt2], images=[image], return_tensors="pt").to(model.device)
with torch.no_grad():
    generated_ids2 = model.generate(**inputs2, max_new_tokens=256, do_sample=False)
full_output2 = processor.decode(generated_ids2[0], skip_special_tokens=False)
print(full_output2)

print("\nDone.")
